note_main_file: id=94 Improved Mangle (spec_tree=-1) — flags were [0,0,524288] (mask2 bit19 — completely wrong). Mangle(Bear)=[0,64,0] mask1 bit6 and Mangle(Cat)=[0,1024,0] mask1 bit10. CORRECTED to [0,1088,0].
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Druid family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_energy_cost: COST FLAT SpellMod for energy spells uses the same op as mana — value is the energy reduction. Verify in-game that COST FLAT fires correctly for energy-costing abilities before deploying.

talent_affixes.name: Feral Aggression
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[8388608,0,0]=0x00800000 (mask0 bit23). No shared Druid marker bits. Ferocious Bite damage +3%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Feral Aggression — Demoralizing Roar portion (reduces AP by 8/16/24/32/40%) — target debuff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Ferocity (5r, tier 1) — Reduces mana cost of Cat Form abilities by 2/4/6/8/10%. Pet/form ability energy costs; complex to implement without specific form-ability flags.
Feral Instinct (3r, tier 2) — Increases threat in Bear Form and reduces stealth detection chance in Cat Form. Mechanic/passive, not implementable as SpellMod.
Thick Hide (3r, tier 2) — Increases armor value from items by 4/7/10%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Feral Swiftness (2r, tier 2) — Increases movement speed in Cat Form and reduces movement impair duration. Movement speed + mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Savage Fury
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[6144,1088,0]: OR of Rake(1822) mask0 bit12(0x1000=4096)|Maul(6807) mask0 bit11(0x800=2048)|Mangle(Cat)(33876) mask1 bit10(0x400=1024)|Mangle(Bear)(33878) mask1 bit6(0x40=64). No shared Druid marker bits. Rake/Mangle damage +2%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Sharpened Claws
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4096,1024,0]: OR of Rake(1822) mask0 bit12(0x1000=4096)|Mangle(Cat)(33876) mask1 bit10(0x400=1024). No shared Druid marker bits. Crit chance +2%/rank on Rake/Mangle (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 200=2%).

talent_affixes.name: Brutal Impact
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[139264,0,0]: OR of Bash(5211) mask0 bit13(0x2000=8192)|Pounce(9005) mask0 bit17(0x20000=131072). No shared Druid marker bits. Bash/Pounce stun duration +0.5s/rank (DURATION FLAT: 500ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Primal Fury (2r, tier 3) — Rage generation on crits in Dire Bear Form; combo point generation on crits in Cat Form. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Predatory Instincts (3r, tier 3) — Reduces AoE damage taken; increases damage of crits from stealth in Cat Form. Passive mitigation + conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Blood Frenzy (2r, tier 3) — Rake and Lacerate cause the target to take 2/4% extra physical damage. Target debuff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Primal Precision (2r, tier 4) — Increases expertise and refunds energy on dodged/parried attacks. Passive stat + proc, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Shredding Attacks
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[32768,0,0]=0x00008000 (mask0 bit15). No shared Druid marker bits. Shred energy cost -9/rank (COST FLAT: -9). NOTE: verify that COST FLAT SpellMod fires correctly for energy-costing abilities in AzerothCore before deploying.

talent_affixes._todo: Feral Charge (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Nurturing Instinct (2r, tier 4) — Increases spell power by 35/70% of Strength. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Heart of the Wild (5r, tier 5) — Increases Intellect; while in Bear Form increases Stamina; while in Cat Form increases AP. Conditional form bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Predatory Strikes (3r, tier 6) — Increases melee AP in Cat/Bear/Moonkin/Tree Form. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Primal Tenacity (3r, tier 6) — Reduces damage and fear duration in Cat/Bear Form. Passive mitigation + mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Mangle
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,1088,0]: OR of Mangle(Bear)(33878) mask1 bit6(0x40=64)|Mangle(Cat)(33876) mask1 bit10(0x400=1024). Mangle cooldown -500ms/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: King of the Jungle (3r, tier 7) — Your Tiger's Fury restores mana; your Enrage increases AP. Proc-based mana return + conditional AP, not implementable as SpellMod.
Leader of the Pack (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Mangle (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design. (The Mangle ability itself, not Improved Mangle.)
Improved Leader of the Pack (2r, tier 8) — LotP also restores health on melee crit. Proc-based heal, not implementable as SpellMod.
Primal Gore (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Rend and Tear (5r, tier 8) — Increases damage of Maul/Shred on bleeding targets and Ferocious Bite crit on bleeding targets. Conditional (target bleeding), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Survival Instincts (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Berserk (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
